title: Make the windowed benchmark advance through the idle-render gate
rationale: The live TzeHouse fullscreen pass rendered exactly one warmup frame, then the production idle-render gate skipped the unchanged composite_tiles_v1 scene until the 30-second watchdog aborted. Because WindowedBenchmarkRunState::record is called only after a presented frame, the harness cannot produce fullscreen/overlay p99 values or evaluate the locked 500 us composite-delta budget.
unblock_condition: A focused fix, with a red-green regression test, makes benchmark mode deterministically present all requested warmup and measured frames without disabling the production idle gate for normal runtime sessions; then rerun the canonical TzeHouse harness and commit windowed_fullscreen_vs_overlay_report.json with composite_delta.p99_us <= 500 or a measured over-budget diagnosis.
